title: ononis arvensis var. spinescens
intro: Ononis arvensis var. spinescens, also known as a spiny restharrow or prickly restharrow, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitumor activities, making it beneficial for various health conditions. The health benefits of Ononis arvensis var. spinescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and potentially prevent certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of dried roots, leaves, or whole plant, which can be infused in hot water or made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
